title: Job Applications — Australia (Mercor, Seek, LinkedIn)
description: Apply for jobs in Australia (remote or on-site) through Mercor, Seek, and LinkedIn. Focus on quantitative, data, and tech roles.
subtasks: Optimize LinkedIn profile for Australian job market
Complete Mercor profile and assessments
Set up Seek job alerts for target roles
Prepare tailored resume for AU format
Research companies hiring remotely in AU
Apply to 5 roles on Seek
Apply to 5 roles on LinkedIn
Apply to 3 roles on Mercor
Follow up on any pending applications
Network with 3 people at target companies on LinkedIn

title: IMC Prosperity 4 — Trading Competition Prep
description: Prepare for IMC Prosperity 4 trading competition. Focus on orderbook analysis, market inefficiencies, options models, and algorithmic strategies. Building on experience from Prosperity 3 (completed 3 rounds).
subtasks: Review IMC Prosperity 3 round structures and scoring
Study orderbook mechanics: L2 data, bid-ask dynamics, depth
Implement orderbook visualization and analysis in Python
Study market microstructure (Bouchaud, Harris)
Review statistical arbitrage strategies (pairs trading, mean reversion)
Study momentum vs mean-reversion regime identification
Implement Black-Scholes from scratch in Python
Study options Greeks and their trading implications
Learn volatility surface modeling and vol smile
Study delta hedging and gamma scalping strategies
Review Avellaneda-Stoikov market making algorithm
Build a simple market-making bot for practice
Study optimal execution (Almgren-Chriss framework)
Practice with past Prosperity rounds/mock scenarios
Develop and backtest 2-3 core strategies

title: AllocQ — Build Agentic Team (Testing Base)
description: Build a multi-agent team for AllocQ as a testing base. Framework and specifics TBD — for now, allocate time and plan architecture.
subtasks: Define agent roles needed for AllocQ
Research and compare agentic frameworks (Claude SDK, LangGraph, CrewAI, AutoGen)
Choose framework and set up project structure
Build first agent prototype
Define test cases for agentic team
Implement inter-agent communication
Build integration tests
Run end-to-end test with AllocQ
Create a copy of the repo to test the agentic framework

title: FRM Level 2 Exam Preparation
description: Prepare for the GARP FRM Level 2 exam in mid-August 2026. Topics: Market Risk (25%), Credit Risk (25%), Operational Risk (25%), Investment Management (15%), Current Issues (10%).
subtasks: Set up Anki deck for FRM L2 with spaced repetition
Market Risk: Study VaR models and backtesting
Market Risk: Fixed income and interest rate risk
Market Risk: Parametric and historical simulation approaches
Credit Risk: Credit scoring and rating models
Credit Risk: CDS pricing and credit derivatives
Credit Risk: Counterparty risk and CVA
Operational Risk: Basel framework and capital requirements
Operational Risk: Model risk management
Operational Risk: Stress testing and scenario analysis
Investment Management: Portfolio construction and risk budgeting
Investment Management: Hedge fund strategies and risk
Current Issues: Read GARP assigned readings
Complete Schweser practice exam 1
Complete Schweser practice exam 2
Complete GARP official practice exam
Review weak areas identified from practice exams
